title: Lysosomal membrane integrity
steps: seed cells (SHSY-5Y) for 24:00:00 in a 12 well plate at a density of 1 x 10 5 cells per well
incubate cells with 5 µg/ml acridine orange (disolved in media) for 00:15:00 at 37 °C
discard medium and wash cells with 1 mL of 1X PBS. Add fresh medium to the wells.
treat cells with SPM (different concentrations: 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2.5, 5 and 10 mM)) and positive control with chloroquine (500 µm) for 02:00:00 at 37 °C
collect cells and resuspend in 1X PBS + 1% BSA.
capture the mean fluoresence of 10 000 events with a flow cytometer.
creator: Joris Van Asselberghs
